evidences.title: Grand Theft Auto VI | GTA Wiki
evidences.content: On May 16, 2024, Take-Two Interactive narrowed the release date of GTA VI from Fiscal Year 2025 to the Fall of Calendar Year 2025 in their Q4 Earnings Presentation. This date would be solidified by later Q1, Q2, and Q3 Earnings Presentations. With the release of the Q3 presentation on February 6, 2025, Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick also added in an IGN interview that he and Rockstar Games felt "really good" about the Fall 2025 release window. However, approximately two weeks before the Q4 presentation, the game was delayed and given a fixed release date of May 26, 2026. This release date would be further pushed to November 19 of the same year, with Rockstar Games giving the reason that "these extra months will allow us to finish the game with the level of polish you have come to expect and [...] The game was first confirmed to be under active development by Rockstar Games on February 4, 2022, with a promise to provide more details in the future. On July 7, 2022, in a further post on their Newswire, Rockstar confirmed that over the past few years, they had steadily been moving more resources and staff "towards the next entry in the Grand Theft Auto series - understanding more than...

evidences.title: February 3 Could Be a Key Moment for GTA 6’s 2026 Release Plans - gHacks Tech News
evidences.content: ### Why the February 3 Earnings Call Matters Take-Two Interactive, the parent company of Rockstar Games, uses quarterly earnings calls to outline its release roadmap and financial outlook. Historically, GTA 6 news has surfaced during these briefings, even if indirectly. Notably: With 2026 now positioned as the launch year, February's call could clarify whether development and marketing are proceeding as planned, or if further adjustments are being considered. ### What to Expect (and What Not to) A new trailer immediately following the February call would strongly suggest that Rockstar is preparing to ramp up marketing and lock in the November release window. Even a brief mention of GTA 6 during the call would be seen as a positive signal. [...] # February 3 Could Be a Key Moment for GTA 6’s 2026 Release Plans February 3 Could Be a Key Moment for GTA 6’s 2026 Release Plans After more than a decade of development and multiple delays, Grand Theft Auto 6 is finally expected to launch in 2026. That makes Take-Two Interactive's upcoming earnings call on February 3 an important date for anyone closely following the game's progress. While earnings calls are primarily meant for investors...

evidences.title: GTA 6 will solidify gaming's role at the heart of entertainment
evidences.content: GTA 6’s launch will solidify gaming’s place at the heart of the entertainment landscape once and for all. And hype is already swelling, as the marketing cycle kicks off in earnest. Since the end of 2023, GTA 6’s launch trailer has amassed 191 million YouTube views. That's more than Barbie’s main trailer, Oppenheimer’s official trailer, and Taylor Swift’s ‘Lavender Haze’ music video combined. The building excitement among consumers is palpable. In Q1 2024, 21% of consumers said they play GTA games, up from 19% at the end of last year. MIDiA’s data here backs up comments from Take-Two’s CEO Strauss Zelnick, who said hype for GTA 6 is having a spillover effect onto GTA 5. evidences.content: 📍Taylor Swift’s Dating History 2008–2025⬇️ ✨ Share & save this Swiftie timeline! 💖 From teenage love stories to NFL romance, Taylor’s relationships have been as iconic as her albums 🎶: 💔 Joe Jonas (2008) – first big heartbreak, inspired songs. 🎬 Taylor Lautner (2009) – the “Taylor & Taylor” era. 🎸 John Mayer (2009–2010) – short but unforgettable. 👑 Jake Gyllenhaal (2010) – gave us All Too Well (10 min). 🎶 Harry Styles (2012–2013) – the “Haylor” chapter. 🎭 Calvin Harris (2015–2016) – her longest pre-Alwyn romance. 🎥 Tom Hiddleston (2016) – the “I <3 T.S.” summer. 🎬 Joe Alwyn (2016–2023) – six years of quiet love. 🏈 Travis Kelce (2023–now) – the fairy tale continues ✨. Taylor turned every heartbreak into art, and now she’s living her real love story. 🌹

evidences.title: GTA 6 delayed again, AI impacts hardware, and Half-Life 3: Analyst predictions for 2026 | Year in Review | GamesIndustry.biz
evidences.content: I’m not expecting GTA 6 to be delayed again and that should ensure the console market has a good year. In the last couple of years subscription service price increases have done the hard work of maintaining the size of the console market, but 2026 should see games spending increase again. As predicted last year, GTA VI will be the largest entertainment release of all time in terms of revenue generated in its launch months. Other content trends I expect in 2026: more mid-priced high-production value games, narrative-focused titles based on cultural heritage, and more - possibly too many - cosy titles. We’ll get more experimentation with AI-driven gameplay, but these will be a sideshow rather than a main event. Cross-platform play and accounts – primarily mobile and PC – will become more [...] ## Manu Rosier, Director of Market Intelligence, Newzoo Emmanuel (Manu) Rosier Emmanuel (Manu) Rosier, Newzoo | Image credit: Newzoo ### 2025 Predictions GTA 6 will dominate the industry Partially correct. Who would have thought that GTA 6 would be delayed twice? Nintendo Switch 2 may struggle to outperform its predecessor Too early to call. The Switch 2 launched strongly on first-party titl...

evidences.title: Public image of Taylor Swift - Wikipedia
evidences.content: In late 2000s, the media labelled Swift in her early career as "America's Sweetheart" for her likability and girl-next-door image; Rolling Stone's Gavin Edwards "Gavin Edwards (writer)") called her "2008's Country Lolita "Lolita (term)")". Swift also earned a reputation for her enthusiasm at award shows. Journalists have written about her polite and "open" personality, calling her a "media darling" and "a reporter's dream". However, The New York Times asserted in 2013 that her "dating history has begun to stir what feels like the beginning of a backlash" and questioned whether she was in the midst of a "quarter-life crisis". Swift has been reluctant to publicly discuss her personal life, calling it "a career weakness". She is a subject of incessant scrutiny in the press. Swift's [...] Swift has been a polarizing figure; according to Coscarelli, even though Swift has "studiously avoided" instances of controversy, she has been met with "extra-musical headlines". Her fame has had detrimental effects on her position in the media; some are genuine critique of her actions, while the rest constitute unverified tabloid gossip that has resulted in various moments of negative press for Sw...

evidences.title: Taylor's Swift (Taylor's Version) & Copyright Law Explained
evidences.content: From a practical standpoint, this means she was unable to perform her old songs without the permission of the owner of her masters, which, in this case, was Big Machine Records. Just prior to the 2019 American Music Awards, Ms. Swift released a statement that she was being blocked from performing any songs from her old albums by Big Machine Records. Big Machine Records was able to do this because they alone held the exclusive rights to reproduce, prepare, distribute, and publicly perform Taylor Swift’s previous “sound recordings.” This authority stems directly from the Copyright Act of 1976. ## FINDING A LOOPHOLE: TAYLOR SWIFT’S RE-RECORDINGS [...] Fitzpatrick Lentz and Bubba # Taylor’s Swift (Taylor’s Version): What Her Re-recordings Teach Us About Copyright Law ## PRACTICE AREAS ## Real Estate, Land Use & Development ## Energy & Infrastructure ## Taxation ## Tax Assessment Appeals & Property Tax Exemptions ## Restaurants & Hospitality ## Project Development & Finance ## Planned Communities & Condominiums ## Personal Injury ## Nonprofit Organizations ## Mergers & Acquisitions ## Litigation & Trial Practice ## Landlord/Tenant Law ## International Business & Trade Law ## Intellec...

evidences.title: How Taylor Swift changed the copyright game by remaking her own music - Harvard Law School | Harvard Law School
evidences.content: This may not be an issue for most artists who sign to record labels — but it likely will be for a select few. “Very few people have the power of a Taylor Swift, but nobody knows who the next Taylor Swift will be,” Greenstein said. “So, if you are a lawyer, you will represent your client zealously.” Want to stay up to date with Harvard Law Today? Sign up for our weekly newsletter. Sign up for the Harvard Law Today newsletter ## Modal Gallery of ## Gallery Block Modal Gallery of [...] Rather than buy into this agreement, Swift announced she would remake the albums. Under her new record deal with Universal Music Group, she’d now own whatever masters she produced. Because she is usually the main songwriter, she would already have rights to the musical works. As the author and owner of her newest masters, Swift now has majority control of her work. Hence, Greenstein said, he’d need to pay Swift royalties if he played one of her songs during the lecture. Presentation title slide. Gary Greenstein. [...] In 2005, a teenaged Taylor Swift signed on to the Big Machine record label and became a global superstar by the time she left the company in 2018.
